name: Murmur
summary: The Murmur are an anomalous late-game threat tied to the Sanctum and fragmented hostile entities.
description: Hostile faction associated with newer endgame regions and unusual enemy forms.

recommendedStatusPlan: Bring endgame-grade generalist damage with room for disruption handling.
Expect encounter-specific mechanics to matter as much as faction matchups.
cautions: Murmur content is mechanic-heavy enough that generic faction advice is only a starting point.
Encounter scripting can matter as much as raw damage matchup quality in this faction's content.

notes: Specific unit taxonomy can be expanded later as the world layer grows.
This faction record is intentionally conservative until more exact Murmur rules are normalized.
